content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Oowlish Technology: Product Manager Growth Focused Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> São Paulo / Buenos Aires Province / Mexico City / Bogota,D.C., Capital District / Greater Fortaleza / Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil / Florianópolis, Santa Catarina, Brazil </p> <div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>About the Role:</b></div><div><br></div><div>We are looking for a&nbsp;<b>Growth-focused Product Manager</b>&nbsp;to drive measurable business impact through experimentation, optimization, and data-driven decision-making. This role is centered on improving&nbsp;<b>acquisition, activation, conversion, and retention</b>&nbsp;across customer-facing experiences such as e-commerce, search, booking, or transactional flows.</div><div><br></div><div>Unlike platform or internal-tools PM roles, this position is deeply hands-on with&nbsp;<b>growth levers</b>. You will design and execute experiments, analyze user behavior, and partner closely with Engineering, Design, Data, and Marketing to identify opportunities that move key business metrics.</div><div><br></div><div>This role is ideal for a Product Manager who thrives in&nbsp;<b>fast-paced environments</b>, enjoys testing hypotheses, and is motivated by clear outcomes such as conversion lift, revenue growth, and improved user engagement.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Key Responsibilities</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Own and drive&nbsp;<b>growth initiatives</b>&nbsp;across key user journeys (e.g., acquisition, conversion, retention)</li><li>Design, prioritize, and deliver&nbsp;<b>experiments and A/B tests</b>&nbsp;with clear hypotheses and success metrics</li><li>Analyze user behavior and funnel performance using product analytics tools</li><li>Partner closely with Engineering and Design to execute experiments efficiently</li><li>Collaborate with Marketing, Data, and other stakeholders to align growth priorities</li><li>Translate insights into actionable product improvements</li><li>Measure impact, share learnings, and iterate based on results</li><li>Balance short-term wins with a longer-term growth strategy</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Must Have:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>5+ years of experience in&nbsp;<b>Product Management</b>, preferably in&nbsp;<b>growth-focused roles</b></li><li>Proven success in designing and delivering&nbsp;<b>experiments and A/B tests</b>&nbsp;that drove business impact</li><li>Strong analytical skills with hands-on experience using tools such as&nbsp;<b>Amplitude, Mixpanel, Google Analytics</b>, or similar</li><li>Experience working on&nbsp;<b>e-commerce, search, booking, or conversion-driven flows</b></li><li>Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills</li><li>Comfortable navigating initiatives of varying scope and ambiguity</li><li>Experience working with&nbsp;<b>cross-functional teams</b>&nbsp;in agile environments</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Nice to have:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Experience with&nbsp;<b>pricing, monetization, or revenue optimization</b>&nbsp;initiatives</li><li>Familiarity with experimentation platforms or feature flagging tools</li><li>Experience in high-traffic consumer products or marketplaces</li><li>Background in startups or fast-paced growth environments</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><br></div><div>Benefits &amp; Perks:</div><div><br></div><div>- Home office</div><div>- Flexible Hours;</div><div>- Competitive compensation based on experience;</div><div>- Career plans to allow for extensive growth in the company;</div><div>- International Projects;</div><div>- Games and Competitions;</div><div>- Enjoy your national Holidays;</div><div>- and more...</div><div><br></div><div>Come join us in breaking the mold and revolutionizing the tech landscape!</div><div><br></div><div>You can also apply here:</div><div><br></div><div>Website: <a class="postings-link" href="https://www.oowlish.com/work-with-us/">https://www.oowlish.com/work-with-us/</a></div><div>LinkedIn: <a class="postings-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/oowlish/jobs/">https://www.linkedin.com/company/oowlish/jobs/</a></div><div>Instagram: <a class="postings-link"
